character.name: 2D game sprite asset, teenage
character.prompt: 2D game sprite asset, teenage Japanese boy protagonist for Altercadia. 2D top-down flat perspective, front-facing character view (Stardew Valley style). Stylized chibi proportions with a slightly oversized head relative to the body. Pixel art with clean line art and flat color blocks. He is a modern adolescent with a cool, confident facial expression, messy anime-style dark hair. He is wearing detailed youth urban techwear: a stylish oversized streetwear jacket with utility straps and zippers, a graphic t-shirt underneath, techwear cargo pants, and futuristic sneakers. Casual but ready standing posture. Color palette: cool gray, matte black, stark white, with striking neon purple or cyber green accents on the jacket straps and shoes. Standing frame, front view under a top-down camera angle, isolated on a solid flat white background.
